name: Tunday Kababi (Aminabad)
vibe: iconic old-Lucknow, crowded, quick-service, authentic Awadhi flavor
reviews: Melt-in-mouth kebabs and fast service.
Best for authentic non-veg Awadhi taste on a budget.

name: Royal Cafe (Hazratganj)
vibe: family-friendly, classic, central city hangout, nostalgic
reviews: Must-visit for chaat lovers.
Comfortable seating and very popular in evenings.

name: Dastarkhwan (Hazratganj)
vibe: traditional dine-in, rich Awadhi aroma, relaxed dinner place
reviews: Flavor-packed curries and good portions.
Reliable choice for biryani and Mughlai meals.

name: Wahid Biryani (Aminabad)
vibe: no-frills, legendary biryani stop, local favorite
reviews: Strong biryani aroma and authentic old-city style.
Great value for money and quick takeaway.

name: Cappuccino Blast (Gomti Nagar)
vibe: modern cafe, youth crowd, cozy, social-media friendly
reviews: Good ambience for groups and casual meetings.
Slightly expensive but consistent food quality.

name: Sky Glass Brewing Co. (Phoenix Palassio)
vibe: upscale, rooftop views, energetic nightlife, premium dining
reviews: Fantastic views of the city skyline and great for weekend hangouts.
The best place for a premium evening experience near the Ekana stadium area.

name: The Hazelnut Factory (Gomti Nagar)
vibe: chic bakery, aesthetically pleasing, student-friendly, dessert heaven
reviews: A paradise for dessert lovers with very Instagrammable interiors.
Great spot for a casual coffee date or catching up on assignments.

name: Sakhawat's (Qaiserbagh)
vibe: historic, hidden gem, no-frills, focused entirely on taste
reviews: Often overlooked but serves some of the most authentic Awadhi food in the city.
Truly traditional flavors that haven't changed in decades.

name: Idris Biryani (Chowk)
vibe: legendary street food, rustic, intense aromas, old-city hustle
reviews: The wood-fired cooking gives this biryani a flavor you won't find anywhere else.
Long queues but absolutely worth the wait for any biryani enthusiast.

name: Netram Ajay Kumar (Aminabad)
vibe: traditional breakfast spot, bustling morning energy, heritage eatery
reviews: The quintessential Lucknow breakfast experience.
The desi ghee preparation makes everything taste incredibly rich.

name: Sharma Tea Stall (Hazratganj)
vibe: iconic social hub, casual, roadside classic, morning tradition
reviews: You haven't experienced Lucknow until you've had tea here.
Simple, consistent, and always crowded with locals sharing stories.

name: Mubeen's (Chowk)
vibe: traditional Mughlai, lively, rich culinary heritage
reviews: Their Nihari is legendary and a must-try during winters.
Affordable and authentic flavors from the heart of the old city.

name: Repertwahr Cafe (Maruti Puram)
vibe: artistic, bohemian, library-themed, tranquil, creative workspace
reviews: A quiet escape perfect for reading a book or working on a laptop.
The atmosphere is incredibly peaceful and creative.

name: G.Y.L.T - Get Your Life Together (Gomti Nagar)
vibe: modern, vibrant, quick-bite focused, trendy among students
reviews: Excellent place for a quick, filling meal with friends.
The vibes are very contemporary and the portions are generous.

name: Lalla Biryani (Chowk)
vibe: small-scale legendary, authentic, specialized, cult following
reviews: Many locals swear this is the best biryani in all of Lucknow.
Simple setup but the taste is unmatched.
